---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for Kruda
labels: enhancement
---

## Use Case

Describe the problem you are trying to solve or the workflow you want to improve.

## Proposed API

How would this feature look from a user's perspective? Include a Go code example.

```go
// Example usage
app := kruda.New()
// ...
```

## Alternatives Considered

What other approaches have you considered? Why is the proposed API preferable?

## Additional Context

Any other relevant information (links, benchmarks, related frameworks).
